name: Luna
description: I was once the scourge of the plains, a terror on the wind. What hope do our enemies think they have? Luna, the Moon Rider Increases total beams and the Eclipse duration. Removes the limit on beams per unit, with the beams appearing twice as fast. Luna may now cast Eclipse on an area, an allied unit, or herself, and have the ability effects follow them.

abilities.name: Lunar Blessing
abilities.description: At nighttime, the Lunar Blessing is Global, and additionally grants Luna bonus night vision. The higher Luna's level, the greater the attack damage bonus and self night vision bonus value.

abilities.name: Lucent Beam
abilities.description: Lucent Damage: Attack damage increased by x.

abilities.name: Lunar Orbit
abilities.description: Luna's glaive spirals out, rotates around her, and instantly attacks collided enemy units for a portion of her attack damage. Grants bonus movement speed and increases damage reduction while active.

abilities.name: Moon Glaives
abilities.description: Luna's attacks bounce between enemy units, and deals lesser damage per bounce.

abilities.name: Eclipse
abilities.description: These lucent strikes are of the corresponding level of Lucent Beam. The beams do not stun their target. Applies of 's corresponding ability level when acquired.
